mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT m.* FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON rm.menu_id = m.id AND rm.is_deleted = 0 INNER JOIN sys_account_role ar ON ar.role_id = rm.role_id AND ar.is_deleted = 0 WHERE ar.account_id = #{accountId} AND m.portal_code = #{portalCode} AND m.visible_status = 1 AND m.status = 1 AND m.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY m.parent_id ASC, m.sort_no ASC, m.id ASC
